title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body:
Community moderation summary for today:

Banned:
• spam_wave_42 — Posted phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes. Immediate ban applied.
• toxic_runner — Repeated targeted harassment against newcomers. Immediate ban applied.

Dismissed:
• report_006 (core_maintainer) — Determined to be a false positive caused by brigading after a moderation decision. No action taken against the reported user.

Open (monitoring):
• report_003 (trusted_helper, medium) — Dispute, under review.
• report_005 (bot_like_user_77, medium) — Suspicious automation, under review.

Reminder: Please report any suspicious activity. We take spam, phishing, and harassment seriously and act quickly to keep the community safe.
